---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new agent, skill, or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Proposal

### Agent or Skill Name

What should it be called?

### Which Side?

- [ ] Claude Code agent (delegates to Codex)
- [ ] Codex agent (delegates to Claude)
- [ ] Skill (Claude Code slash command)
- [ ] Both sides (matched pair)
- [ ] Other (scripts, CI, docs)

### Use Case

What problem does this solve? When would someone use it?

### Proposed Behavior

How should it work? What should the output look like?

### Model Routing

Which model should handle the core logic and why?
(e.g., "Codex for the review because it needs a different perspective than the author")

### Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?
